---
title: "STAT123FINALPART1"
format: docx
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(GGally)
```

```{r}
#Question 1
#a)
employees <- c("Alice", "Bob", "Charlie", "David", "Eva")
#b)
salaries <- c(50000, 55000, 60000, 65000, 70000)
names(salaries) <- employees
salaries
#c)
salaries[3]
salaries["Charlie"]
```

```{}
```
